name: Greysson Memory
description: Unified memory layer plugin — semantic search (ChromaDB) + topic crystallization, complementing LCM's conversation compaction.

chromaDbPath.description: Path to ChromaDB vector store directory

ollamaBaseUrl.description: Base URL for Ollama embedding API

maxTopicDocs.description: Maximum topic documents to inject per turn

maxMemoryResults.description: Maximum semantic memory results to inject

minMemoryScore.description: Minimum similarity score for memory results (0-1, higher = more similar)

crystallizationReminder.description: Append crystallization checkpoint reminder to system context

skipTriggers.description: Triggers that should skip memory injection entirely
